Home.heading: Project ready!
Home.body1: You may now add components and start building.
Home.body2: We've already added the button component for you.

Auth.infoMagicLink: Check your email for the sign-in link.
Auth.infoOtpCode: Enter the code we emailed you.
Auth.descriptionStepUp: For your security, sign in again to continue.
Auth.descriptionDefault: Use your email, OAuth, or passkey — pick what works best.
Auth.stepUpAlertDescription: Sensitive action — confirm it is you before continuing.
Auth.passwordRequirements: Use at least 8 characters. Avoid passwords you use elsewhere.
Auth.otpHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your email. You can paste the full code.

session_expired.title: Session expired
session_expired.description: Sign in again to continue where you left off.
session_expired.descriptionWithContext: Your session ended while you were working. {context}
session_expired.trustNote: Sessions expire after a period of inactivity to protect your organization.

step_up_required.title: Additional verification required
step_up_required.description: For your security, sign in again to continue this sensitive action.
step_up_required.trustNote: Step-up verification helps ensure only you can change critical settings.

mfa_required.title: Multi-factor authentication required
mfa_required.description: Your organization requires a second factor. Complete sign-in to continue.
mfa_required.trustNote: MFA reduces the risk of unauthorized access to your workspace.

email_unverified.title: Verify your email
email_unverified.description: Confirm your email address before continuing. Check your inbox for a verification link.
email_unverified.trustNote: Unverified accounts cannot access some ERP features for security reasons.

org_required.title: Workspace setup needed
org_required.description: Create or join an organization to open the dashboard.
org_required.trustNote: Your account must belong to an active workspace before ERP modules are available.

invitation_expired.title: Invitation no longer valid
invitation_expired.description: This invitation has expired or was revoked. Ask your administrator for a new invite.

rate_limited.title: Too many attempts
rate_limited.description: Try again in a few minutes. If you need access urgently, contact your administrator.
rate_limited.trustNote: Rate limits protect accounts from automated attacks.

sign_in_failed.title: Sign-in could not complete
sign_in_failed.description: Check your credentials and try again. If the problem continues, use another sign-in method or reset your password.

unknown_failure.title: Something went wrong
unknown_failure.description: We could not complete that request. Sign in again or return home.

Lynx.title: Lynx
Lynx.description: Afenda’s machine layer for resolving truth, preparing work, and recommending controlled action.

truth.sectionDescription: Ask a question. Lynx answers from your organization’s stored knowledge chunks only.
truth.placeholderQuestion: e.g. Why was this return rejected?
truth.errorStream: Could not read the response stream.
truth.evidenceEmpty: No passages retrieved. Add knowledge chunks below.

substrate.addDescription: Add text chunks with embeddings so Truth retrieval has evidence to draw on.
substrate.searchDescription: Debug retrieval with raw cosine distance — the same substrate Truth retrieval uses.

Knowledge.placeholderBody: Paste or type the text to embed…
Knowledge.placeholderSearch: Describe what you are looking for…

Admin.usersSubtitle: Admin plugin — requires permission to list users.
Admin.emptyUsers: No users returned (empty project or insufficient admin access).

PlatformAdmin.title: Platform administration
PlatformAdmin.description: Global tools for operators with the admin role. Organization admins use the workspace Admin workbench from the ERP dashboard.
PlatformAdmin.usersCardDescription: List and inspect Better Auth users (admin plugin).

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Quick snapshot of membership and shortcuts to governance tools.
overview.membersCardDescription: People with access to this workspace.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Workspace administration links. Identity and security stay on your account profile.
settings.accountSecurityDescription: Sessions, passkeys, and verification for your user.
settings.orgProfileDescription: Name and slug are shown across the workspace.
settings.orgProfileHint: To change organization details, use the account organization page or contact support if your plan includes assisted changes.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect external systems and automate workflows. More surfaces will land here as the IAM and ERP roadmap progresses.
integrations.webhooksDescription: Notify external URLs when organization events occur.
integrations.webhooksSoon: Webhook endpoints, signing secrets, and delivery history are planned. Server actions and audit hooks will follow the IAM policy in AGENTS.md.
integrations.importDescription: Invite or provision many users from a file.
integrations.importSoon: CSV preview, validation, and rate-limited invites will ship after core audit and webhook contracts are stable.
